title: Device Home Screen - No Device connected - Supported List - Onboarding
scenario: Verify that tapping each device under the "Onboarding" section from the "Supported devices" screen displays correct onboarding information when no device is connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is currently connected to the phone.
3. On the Home screen, tap the 'Supported devices' button.
4. In the 'Supported devices' list, locate the 'Onboarding' section.
5. Tap on the first device listed under the 'Onboarding' section.
6. Observe the onboarding information displayed for that device.
8. Repeat steps 5-7 for each device listed under the 'Onboarding' section.
expected: Tapping each device under the 'Onboarding' section displays the correct onboarding information (e.g., setup instructions, pairing steps, or device-specific guidance) for that specific device.
